text:
video recording, technique of recording, copying and broadcasting of moving visual images, also known as videotape recording, video. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "technique"
- Commons category: "Video"
- main Wikidata property: "video"
- different from: "film"
- uses: "video camera",
 "videocassette recorder",
 "electronic visual display",
 "closed-circuit television"
- hashtag: "videos"
- said to be the same as: "videography"
